mapper.select: SELECT board_no ,title ,content ,writer ,view_cnt ,writer_date FROM tbl_board ORDER BY board_no
SELECT board_no ,title ,content ,writer ,view_cnt ,writer_date FROM tbl_board WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY board_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board (board_no, title, writer, content) VALUES (board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{writer}, #{content})
